creator: trashcan@ellael.org
text:
With the recent poudriere-devel-3.4.99.20240708 I am getting:

[00:00:45] Package fetch: Generating logs for fetched packages
[00:00:45] Error: /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:20:download_from_repo_post_delete: We lost fetched unversioned doxygen-1.9.6_1,2.pkg
Error: (71281) /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:257: set -e error: status = 70
[00:00:45] Cleaning up


Have a look at https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/poudriere-error.94146/
